drl:
rule "R0"

no-loop
when
    T0(f1 <= 100, $b0_0_0 : f3, $b0_0_1 : f0)
    T0($b0_1_0 : f0)
    T2(f0 < 5)

when

rule "R2"

rule "R3"

    T2(f1 < 5)

end
rule "R4"
when

rule "R5"

when
